commands.name: csharp

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Disables Analytics and Error Reporting

arguments.name: swaggerFile
arguments.description:
Path to the Swagger / Open API specification 
file

arguments.name: namespace
arguments.description: Default namespace to in the generated code

arguments.name: outputFile
arguments.description:
Output filename to write the generated code to. 
Default is the swaggerFile .cs

options.name: --backing-store
options.description:
Generate EF backing store code in models (default:
FALSE)

options.name: --generate-multiple-files
options.description:
Set this to TRUE to generate multiple files 
(default: FALSE)

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Disables Analytics and Error Reporting

options.name: --type-access-modifier
options.description:
Set the access modifier for the generated types 
(default: public)

arguments.name: swaggerFile
arguments.description:
Path to the Swagger / Open API specification 
file

arguments.name: namespace
arguments.description: Default namespace to in the generated code

arguments.name: outputFile
arguments.description:
Output filename to write the generated code to. 
Default is the swaggerFile .cs

options.name: --class-style
options.description:
C# Class Style. 
POCO (Plain Old C# Objects), 

Inpc (Implements INotifyPropertyChanged), 
Prism (Prism base class), 

Records (readonly POCO)

options.name: --document-title-as-class-name
options.description:
Set this to TRUE to use the OpenAPI Document Info 
Title as the generated class name. 
Set this to FALSE to use the filename 
(default: TRUE)

options.name: --generate-dto-types
options.description:
Set this to TRUE to generate DTO types (default: 
TRUE)

options.name: --generate-interfaces
options.description:
Set this to TRUE to generate client interfaces 
(default: TRUE)

options.name: --inject-http-client
options.description:
Set this to TRUE to generate the constructor that 
accepts HttpClient (default: TRUE)

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Disables Analytics and Error Reporting

options.name: --parameter-date-time-format
options.description:
Specifies the format for DateTime type method 
parameters

options.name: --use-base-url
options.description:
Set this to TRUE to include a base URL for every 
HTTP request (default: FALSE)

arguments.name: swaggerFile
arguments.description:
Path to the Swagger / Open API specification 
file

arguments.name: namespace
arguments.description: Default namespace to in the generated code

arguments.name: outputFile
arguments.description:
Output filename to write the generated code to. 
Default is the swaggerFile .cs

options.name: --custom-additional-properties-props
options.description:
Setting this will override all the other 
additional properties

options.name: --emit-default-value
options.description:
Set to true if the default value for a member 
should be generated in the serialization stream. Setting the EmitDefaultValue 
property to false is not a recommended practice. It should only be done if there
is a specific need to do so (such as for interoperability or to reduce data 
size).

options.name: --generate-multiple-files
options.description:
Generate multiple files for each operation. This 
only works for SDK style projects

options.name: --generate-property-changed
options.description: Generate PropertyChanged notifications

options.name: --http-user-agent
options.description:
Sets the User-Agent header value to be sent in the
HTTP request

options.name: --method-argument
options.description:
C# Optional method argument, e.g. void square(int 
x=10) (.net 4.0+ only).

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Disables Analytics and Error Reporting

options.name: --skip-form-model
options.description:
To skip models defined as the form parameters in 
'requestBody'

options.name: --target-framework
options.description:
The target .NET Standard / Core / Framework 
version

options.name: --templates-path
options.description:
Path to directory containing additional mustache 
template files

options.name: --use-collection
options.description: Use collection instead of list

options.name: --use-configuration-file
options.description: Use the configuration file if present

options.name: --use-datetimeoffset
options.description: Use DateTimeOffset to model date-time properties

options.name: --version
options.description: The version of the generator to use

arguments.name: swaggerFile
arguments.description:
Path to the Swagger / Open API specification 
file

arguments.name: namespace
arguments.description: Default namespace to in the generated code

arguments.name: outputFile
arguments.description:
Output filename to write the generated code to. 
Default is the swaggerFile .cs

options.name: --cancellation-tokens
options.description:
Set this to generate the API interface with 
Cancellation Tokens

options.name: --generate-internal-types
--multiple-files
options.description: Generate multiple files

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Disables Analytics and Error Reporting

options.name: --no-operation-headers
options.description: Don't generate operation headers

options.name: --return-api-response
options.description:
Set this to wrap the returned the contract types 
in IApiResponse<T> (default: Disabled)

options.name: --settings-file
options.description:
Path to a .refitter settings file to use for code 
generation

options.name: --skip-generate-contracts
options.description:
Set this to skip generating the contract types 
(default: Enabled)

options.name: --skip-generate-xml-doc-code-comments
options.description:
Set this to skip generating XML doc style code 
comments (default: Enabled)

arguments.name: swaggerFile
arguments.description:
Path to the Swagger / Open API specification 
file

arguments.name: namespace
arguments.description: Default namespace to in the generated code

arguments.name: outputFile
arguments.description:
Output filename to write the generated code to. 
Default is the swaggerFile .cs

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Disables Analytics and Error Reporting

arguments.name: swaggerFile
arguments.description:
Path to the Swagger / Open API specification 
file

arguments.name: namespace
arguments.description: Default namespace to in the generated code

arguments.name: outputFile
arguments.description:
Output filename to write the generated code to. 
Default is the swaggerFile .cs

commands.description: Generate C# API clients using various generators

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Disables Analytics and Error Reporting

arguments.name: swaggerFile
arguments.description: Path to the Swagger / Open API specification file

arguments.name: outputPath
arguments.description: Output folder to write the generated code to

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Disables Analytics and Error Reporting

arguments.name: generator
arguments.description:
The tech stack to use for generating code.
See 
supported generators at https://openapi-generator.tech/docs/generators/

arguments.name: swaggerFile
arguments.description: Path to the Swagger / Open API specification file

arguments.name: outputPath
arguments.description: Output folder to write the generated code to

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Disables Analytics and Error Reporting

arguments.name: generator
arguments.description:
The tech stack to use for the generated client 
library

arguments.name: swaggerFile
arguments.description: Path to the Swagger / Open API specification file

arguments.name: outputPath
arguments.description: Output folder to write the generated code to
